---
title: "Data Entry"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data Entry}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    embed-resources: false
    resources:
      - shinylive-sw.js
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script>document.head.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend','<meta name="shinylive:serviceworker_dir" content=".">');</script>
filters:
  - shinylive
---

> **First load takes ~30 seconds** while your browser downloads the R runtime
> (WebAssembly). No server is required вЂ” everything runs locally.
>
> Prefer a desktop experience? Run `bayesma::launch_data_entry()` in your R
> session to open the same app in a browser window.

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 1100

library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Constants в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”ЂпїЅпїЅпїЅв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

STUDY_COLS <- c("Author", "Year", "Subgroup", "Control", "Intervention")

OUTCOME_EXTRA <- list(
  binary     = c("N_Control", "N_Intervention",
                 "Event_Control", "Event_Intervention"),
  continuous = c("N_Control", "N_Intervention",
                 "Mean_Control", "SD_Control",
                 "Mean_Intervention", "SD_Intervention"),
  count      = c("N_Control", "N_Intervention",
                 "Count_Control", "Exposure_Control",
                 "Count_Intervention", "Exposure_Intervention")
)

ROB_DOMAIN_COLS <- list(
  rob2             = c("D1", "D2", "D3", "D4", "D5", "Overall"),
  robins_i         = c("D1", "D2", "D3", "D4", "D5", "D6", "D7", "Overall"),
  newcastle_ottawa = c("Selection", "Comparability", "Outcome", "Total"),
  quadas2          = c("PD1", "PD2", "PD3", "PD4", "AC1", "AC2", "AC3", "Overall")
)

ROB_DOMAIN_LABELS <- list(
  rob2 = c(
    D1 = "D1: Randomisation process",
    D2 = "D2: Deviations from intended interventions",
    D3 = "D3: Missing outcome data",
    D4 = "D4: Measurement of the outcome",
    D5 = "D5: Selection of reported results",
    Overall = "Overall"
  ),
  robins_i = c(
    D1 = "D1: Confounding",
    D2 = "D2: Selection of participants",
    D3 = "D3: Classification of interventions",
    D4 = "D4: Deviations from intended interventions",
    D5 = "D5: Missing data",
    D6 = "D6: Measurement of outcomes",
    D7 = "D7: Selection of reported results",
    Overall = "Overall"
  ),
  newcastle_ottawa = c(
    Selection = "Selection (0-4)",
    Comparability = "Comparability (0-2)",
    Outcome = "Outcome (0-3)",
    Total = "Total (0-9)"
  ),
  quadas2 = c(
    PD1 = "PD1: Patient selection",
    PD2 = "PD2: Index test",
    PD3 = "PD3: Reference standard",
    PD4 = "PD4: Flow and timing",
    AC1 = "AC1: Patient selection",
    AC2 = "AC2: Index test",
    AC3 = "AC3: Reference standard",
    Overall = "Overall"
  )
)

INSPECT_COLS <- c(
  "d1_1", "d1_2", "d1_3",
  "d2_1", "d2_2", "d2_3", "d2_4", "d2_5",
  "d3_1", "d3_2",
  "d4_1", "d4_2", "d4_4", "d4_5", "d4_7", "d4_10", "d4_11"
)

INSPECT_LABELS <- c(
  d1_1 = "D1.1 Registration prospective",
  d1_2 = "D1.2 Registration consistent",
  d1_3 = "D1.3 SAP consistent",
  d2_1 = "D2.1 Ethical approval",
  d2_2 = "D2.2 Primary registry",
  d2_3 = "D2.3 Registered before enrolment",
  d2_4 = "D2.4 Protocol vs conduct",
  d2_5 = "D2.5 Other conduct concerns",
  d3_1 = "D3.1 All outcomes reported",
  d3_2 = "D3.2 Selective reporting",
  d4_1 = "D4.1 Flow consistent",
  d4_2 = "D4.2 Analysis populations",
  d4_4 = "D4.4 Data errors",
  d4_5 = "D4.5 Data duplication",
  d4_7 = "D4.7 Per guidelines",
  d4_10 = "D4.10 Retraction",
  d4_11 = "D4.11 Other concerns"
)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Helpers в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

empty_df <- function(cols) {
  structure(
    replicate(length(cols), character(0), simplify = FALSE),
    names = cols, class = "data.frame", row.names = integer(0)
  )
}

blank_row <- function(cols, vals = list()) {
  row <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(cols))), cols)
  for (nm in names(vals)) row[[nm]] <- vals[[nm]]
  as.data.frame(row, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

sync_rows <- function(target, study_df, id_cols, extra_cols) {
  all_cols <- c(id_cols, extra_cols)
  if (nrow(study_df) == 0) return(target)
  existing_keys <- if (nrow(target) > 0)
    paste(target[[id_cols[1]]], target[[id_cols[2]]], sep = "|||")
  else character(0)
  need <- empty_df(all_cols)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(study_df))) {
    k <- paste(study_df$Author[i], study_df$Year[i], sep = "|||")
    if (!k %in% existing_keys)
      need <- bind_rows(need, blank_row(all_cols,
                        list(Author = study_df$Author[i], Year = study_df$Year[i])))
  }
  bind_rows(target, need)
}

sync_inspect_rows <- function(target, study_df) {
  all_cols <- c("study", INSPECT_COLS)
  if (nrow(study_df) == 0) return(target)
  existing <- if (nrow(target) > 0) target$study else character(0)
  need <- empty_df(all_cols)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(study_df))) {
    lbl <- paste0(study_df$Author[i], " (", study_df$Year[i], ")")
    if (!lbl %in% existing)
      need <- bind_rows(need, blank_row(all_cols, list(study = lbl)))
  }
  bind_rows(target, need)
}

dt_base <- function(df) {
  datatable(
    df, editable = TRUE, selection = "single", rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 50, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip",
                   autoWidth = FALSE, scrollCollapse = TRUE)
  )
}

# в”Ђв”Ђ CSS в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

app_css <- "
body { font-size: 0.88rem; }
.section-hd {
  background:#4F6D8A; color:white; padding:9px 14px;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  border-radius:6px 6px 0 0;
}
.section-hd h6 { margin:0; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:600; }
.section-body  { border:1px solid #dee2e6; border-top:none;
                 border-radius:0 0 6px 6px; padding:14px; margin-bottom:18px; }
.btn-bar       { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; align-items:center;
                 margin-bottom:8px; }
.btn-bar .lbl  { font-weight:600; font-size:0.85rem; }
.sel-info      { padding:5px 11px; background:#eaf4fb;
                 border-left:3px solid #3191bf;
                 font-size:0.83rem; margin-bottom:8px;
                 border-radius:0 4px 4px 0; }
.btn-low       { background:#77bb41; color:#fff; border:none; }
.btn-low:hover { background:#5e9430; color:#fff; }
.btn-some      { background:#f5c518; color:#2E3A4A; border:none; }
.btn-some:hover{ background:#d4a814; color:#2E3A4A; }
.btn-mod       { background:#f5a623; color:#fff; border:none; }
.btn-mod:hover { background:#d48c1c; color:#fff; }
.btn-ser       { background:#e07000; color:#fff; border:none; }
.btn-ser:hover { background:#c06000; color:#fff; }
.btn-high      { background:#e32400; color:#fff; border:none; }
.btn-high:hover{ background:#c21e00; color:#fff; }
.btn-crit      { background:#8b0000; color:#fff; border:none; }
.btn-crit:hover{ background:#6a0000; color:#fff; }
.btn-unc       { background:#adb5bd; color:#fff; border:none; }
.dl-row        { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; }
"

# в”Ђв”Ђ UI в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

ui <- fluidPage(
  theme = bs_theme(bootswatch = "cosmo", primary = "#3191bf"),
  tags$head(tags$style(HTML(app_css))),

  div(style = "max-width:1300px; margin:0 auto; padding:16px;",

    # в”Ђв”Ђ 1. Study Details в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    div(class = "section-hd",
        h6("1  Study Details"),
        div(actionButton("add_study", "Add study",
                         icon = icon("plus"), class = "btn-sm btn-light"),
            actionButton("del_study", "Remove selected",
                         icon = icon("minus"), class = "btn-sm btn-danger ms-2"))),
    div(class = "section-body",
        p(class = "text-muted small mb-2",
          "Author and Year are used as identifiers вЂ” all other sections sync from these two columns."),
        DTOutput("study_tbl")),

    # в”Ђв”Ђ 2. Outcome Details в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    div(class = "section-hd",
        h6("2  Outcome Details"),
        radioButtons("outcome_type", NULL,
                     choices = c("Binary" = "binary",
                                 "Continuous" = "continuous",
                                 "Count" = "count"),
                     selected = "binary", inline = TRUE)),
    div(class = "section-body",
        div(class = "btn-bar",
            actionButton("sync_outcome", "Sync studies",
                         icon = icon("arrows-rotate"),
                         class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")),
        DTOutput("outcome_tbl")),

    # в”Ђв”Ђ 3. Risk of Bias в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    div(class = "section-hd",
        h6("3  Risk of Bias"),
        div(style = "display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center;",
            span("Tool:", style = "font-size:0.83rem;"),
            selectInput("rob_tool", NULL,
                        choices = c("RoB 2" = "rob2",
                                    "ROBINS-I" = "robins_i",
                                    "Newcastle-Ottawa" = "newcastle_ottawa",
                                    "QUADAS-2" = "quadas2"),
                        width = "170px"))),
    div(class = "section-body",
        uiOutput("rob_btn_bar"),
        uiOutput("rob_sel_info"),
        div(class = "btn-bar",
            actionButton("sync_rob", "Sync studies",
                         icon = icon("arrows-rotate"),
                         class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")),
        DTOutput("rob_tbl")),

    # в”Ђв”Ђ 4. INSPECT-SR в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    div(class = "section-hd",
        h6("4  INSPECT-SR  (manual judgements)")),
    div(class = "section-body",
        p(class = "text-muted small mb-2",
          "Items D4.3 (Carlisle), D4.6 (N-consistency), D4.8 (GRIM), D4.9 (p-value) ",
          "are computed by ", code("inspect_sr()"), " вЂ” not entered here."),
        div(class = "btn-bar",
            span(class = "lbl", "Insert:"),
            actionButton("btn_isp_none",    "No concerns",      class = "btn-sm btn-low"),
            actionButton("btn_isp_some",    "Some concerns",    class = "btn-sm btn-some"),
            actionButton("btn_isp_serious", "Serious concerns", class = "btn-sm btn-high"),
            actionButton("btn_isp_clear",   "Clear",            class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")),
        uiOutput("inspect_sel_info"),
        div(class = "btn-bar",
            actionButton("sync_inspect", "Sync studies",
                         icon = icon("arrows-rotate"),
                         class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")),
        DTOutput("inspect_tbl")),

    # в”Ђв”Ђ Download в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
    div(class = "section-hd", h6("Download")),
    div(class = "section-body",
        fluidRow(
          column(6,
                 h6("Individual files"),
                 div(class = "dl-row",
                     downloadButton("dl_study",   "Study Details (.rda)",  class = "btn-sm btn-primary"),
                     downloadButton("dl_outcome", "Outcome Data (.rda)",   class = "btn-sm btn-primary"),
                     downloadButton("dl_rob",     "Risk of Bias (.rda)",   class = "btn-sm btn-primary"),
                     downloadButton("dl_inspect", "INSPECT-SR (.rda)",     class = "btn-sm btn-primary"))),
          column(6,
                 h6("Everything in one file"),
                 p(class = "text-muted small",
                   "Saves four named objects: ",
                   code("study_details"), ", ",
                   code("outcome_data"), ", ",
                   code("rob_data"), ", ",
                   code("inspect_sr"), "."),
                 downloadButton("dl_all", "All datasets (.rda)", class = "btn-success"))))
  )
)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Server в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  rv <- reactiveValues(
    study       = empty_df(STUDY_COLS),
    outcome     = empty_df(c("Author", "Year", OUTCOME_EXTRA[["binary"]])),
    rob         = empty_df(c("Author", "Year", ROB_DOMAIN_COLS[["rob2"]])),
    inspect     = empty_df(c("study", INSPECT_COLS)),
    sel_rob     = NULL,
    sel_inspect = NULL
  )

  # в”Ђв”Ђ 1. Study Details в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

  output$study_tbl <- renderDT(dt_base(rv$study))

  observeEvent(input$study_tbl_cell_edit, {
    e <- input$study_tbl_cell_edit
    rv$study[e$row, e$col + 1] <- DT::coerceValue(e$value, rv$study[[e$col + 1]][e$row])
  })
  observeEvent(input$add_study, {
    rv$study <- bind_rows(rv$study, blank_row(STUDY_COLS))
  })
  observeEvent(input$del_study, {
    sel <- input$study_tbl_rows_selected
    if (length(sel)) rv$study <- rv$study[-sel, , drop = FALSE]
  })

  # в”Ђв”Ђ 2. Outcome Details в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

  observeEvent(input$outcome_type, {
    cols <- c("Author", "Year", OUTCOME_EXTRA[[input$outcome_type]])
    existing <- rv$outcome |> select(any_of(c("Author", "Year")))
    pad <- empty_df(setdiff(cols, c("Author", "Year")))
    rv$outcome <- if (nrow(existing) > 0)
      bind_rows(empty_df(cols),
                bind_cols(existing, pad[rep(1L, nrow(existing)), , drop = FALSE]))
    else empty_df(cols)
  }, ignoreInit = TRUE)

  output$outcome_tbl <- renderDT(dt_base(rv$outcome))

  observeEvent(input$outcome_tbl_cell_edit, {
    e <- input$outcome_tbl_cell_edit
    rv$outcome[e$row, e$col + 1] <- DT::coerceValue(e$value, rv$outcome[[e$col + 1]][e$row])
  })
  observeEvent(input$sync_outcome, {
    rv$outcome <- sync_rows(rv$outcome, rv$study, c("Author", "Year"),
                            OUTCOME_EXTRA[[input$outcome_type]])
  })

  # в”Ђв”Ђ 3. Risk of Bias в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

  observeEvent(input$rob_tool, {
    cols <- c("Author", "Year", ROB_DOMAIN_COLS[[input$rob_tool]])
    existing <- rv$rob |> select(any_of(c("Author", "Year")))
    pad <- empty_df(setdiff(cols, c("Author", "Year")))
    rv$rob <- if (nrow(existing) > 0)
      bind_rows(empty_df(cols),
                bind_cols(existing, pad[rep(1L, nrow(existing)), , drop = FALSE]))
    else empty_df(cols)
    rv$sel_rob <- NULL
  }, ignoreInit = TRUE)

  output$rob_btn_bar <- renderUI({
    tool <- req(input$rob_tool)
    if (tool == "newcastle_ottawa") {
      return(div(class = "btn-bar",
                 span(class = "lbl", "Enter scores directly in the table."),
                 span(class = "text-muted small",
                      "(Selection 0-4, Comparability 0-2, Outcome 0-3)")))
    }
    btns <- switch(tool,
      rob2 = list(
        list(id="btn_rob_low",  label="Low",           cls="btn-low"),
        list(id="btn_rob_some", label="Some concerns", cls="btn-some"),
        list(id="btn_rob_high", label="High",          cls="btn-high")
      ),
      robins_i = list(
        list(id="btn_rob_low",  label="Low",      cls="btn-low"),
        list(id="btn_rob_mod",  label="Moderate", cls="btn-mod"),
        list(id="btn_rob_ser",  label="Serious",  cls="btn-ser"),
        list(id="btn_rob_crit", label="Critical", cls="btn-crit")
      ),
      quadas2 = list(
        list(id="btn_rob_low",  label="Low",     cls="btn-low"),
        list(id="btn_rob_high", label="High",    cls="btn-high"),
        list(id="btn_rob_unc",  label="Unclear", cls="btn-unc")
      )
    )
    tagList(
      div(class = "btn-bar",
          span(class = "lbl", "Insert:"),
          lapply(btns, function(b)
            actionButton(b$id, b$label, class = paste("btn-sm", b$cls))),
          actionButton("btn_rob_clear", "Clear", class = "btn-sm btn-outline-secondary")),
      p(class = "text-muted small mb-1",
        "Click a domain cell in the table, then click a button to fill it.")
    )
  })

  output$rob_sel_info <- renderUI({
    sel <- rv$sel_rob
    if (is.null(sel)) return(NULL)
    lbl <- ROB_DOMAIN_LABELS[[input$rob_tool]][[sel$col_name]] %||% sel$col_name
    div(class = "sel-info",
        "Selected: ", tags$strong(sel$study), " вЂ” ", lbl)
  })

  output$rob_tbl <- renderDT(dt_base(rv$rob))

  observeEvent(input$rob_tbl_cell_edit, {
    e <- input$rob_tbl_cell_edit
    rv$rob[e$row, e$col + 1] <- DT::coerceValue(e$value, rv$rob[[e$col + 1]][e$row])
  })
  observeEvent(input$rob_tbl_cell_clicked, {
    ci <- input$rob_tbl_cell_clicked
    if (is.null(ci$row) || length(ci$row) == 0 || (ci$col + 1L) <= 2L) return()
    col_name <- names(rv$rob)[ci$col + 1L]
    rv$sel_rob <- list(row = ci$row, col_name = col_name,
                       study = paste(rv$rob$Author[ci$row], rv$rob$Year[ci$row]))
  })

  fill_rob <- function(val) {
    sel <- rv$sel_rob
    if (!is.null(sel) && sel$row <= nrow(rv$rob))
      rv$rob[sel$row, sel$col_name] <- val
  }
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_low,   fill_rob("Low"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_some,  fill_rob("Some concerns"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_high,  fill_rob("High"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_mod,   fill_rob("Moderate"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_ser,   fill_rob("Serious"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_crit,  fill_rob("Critical"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_unc,   fill_rob("Unclear"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_rob_clear, fill_rob(""))

  observeEvent(input$sync_rob, {
    rv$rob <- sync_rows(rv$rob, rv$study, c("Author", "Year"),
                        ROB_DOMAIN_COLS[[input$rob_tool]])
  })

  # в”Ђв”Ђ 4. INSPECT-SR в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

  output$inspect_sel_info <- renderUI({
    sel <- rv$sel_inspect
    if (is.null(sel)) return(NULL)
    lbl <- INSPECT_LABELS[[sel$col_name]] %||% sel$col_name
    div(class = "sel-info",
        "Selected: ", tags$strong(sel$study), " вЂ” ", lbl)
  })

  output$inspect_tbl <- renderDT({
    df <- rv$inspect
    nmap <- INSPECT_LABELS[intersect(names(INSPECT_LABELS), names(df))]
    names(df)[names(df) %in% names(nmap)] <- nmap[names(df)[names(df) %in% names(nmap)]]
    dt_base(df)
  })

  observeEvent(input$inspect_tbl_cell_edit, {
    e <- input$inspect_tbl_cell_edit
    rv$inspect[e$row, e$col + 1] <- DT::coerceValue(
      e$value, rv$inspect[[e$col + 1]][e$row])
  })
  observeEvent(input$inspect_tbl_cell_clicked, {
    ci <- input$inspect_tbl_cell_clicked
    if (is.null(ci$row) || length(ci$row) == 0 || (ci$col + 1L) <= 1L) return()
    col_name <- names(rv$inspect)[ci$col + 1L]
    rv$sel_inspect <- list(row = ci$row, col_name = col_name,
                           study = rv$inspect$study[ci$row])
  })

  fill_inspect <- function(val) {
    sel <- rv$sel_inspect
    if (!is.null(sel) && sel$row <= nrow(rv$inspect))
      rv$inspect[sel$row, sel$col_name] <- val
  }
  observeEvent(input$btn_isp_none,    fill_inspect("No concerns"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_isp_some,    fill_inspect("Some concerns"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_isp_serious, fill_inspect("Serious concerns"))
  observeEvent(input$btn_isp_clear,   fill_inspect(""))

  observeEvent(input$sync_inspect, {
    rv$inspect <- sync_inspect_rows(rv$inspect, rv$study)
  })

  # в”Ђв”Ђ Downloads в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

  output$dl_study <- downloadHandler(
    filename = "study_details.rda",
    content  = function(file) { study_details <- rv$study;  save(study_details, file = file) }
  )
  output$dl_outcome <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() paste0("outcome_data_", input$outcome_type, ".rda"),
    content  = function(file) { outcome_data <- rv$outcome; save(outcome_data, file = file) }
  )
  output$dl_rob <- downloadHandler(
    filename = "rob_data.rda",
    content  = function(file) { rob_data <- rv$rob;         save(rob_data, file = file) }
  )
  output$dl_inspect <- downloadHandler(
    filename = "inspect_sr.rda",
    content  = function(file) { inspect_sr <- rv$inspect;   save(inspect_sr, file = file) }
  )
  output$dl_all <- downloadHandler(
    filename = "bayesma_data.rda",
    content  = function(file) {
      study_details <- rv$study
      outcome_data  <- rv$outcome
      rob_data      <- rv$rob
      inspect_sr    <- rv$inspect
      save(study_details, outcome_data, rob_data, inspect_sr, file = file)
    }
  )
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
